channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: China’s Xi says AI ‘should not be a solo performance by a single country’
item.description: The Chinese leader called for more international cooperation in developing the technology at a conference in Shanghai.

item.title: Texas floods ravage through southwestern areas of state
item.description: At least 2 people are dead, and over 200 were rescued in catastrophic floods in the Texas Hill Country region.

item.title: Key takeaways from Donald Trump’s controversial speech on election security
item.description: The president claimed China and 'deep state' actors had deceived US voters, but critics say his claims were misleading.

item.title: US bombards Iran in sixth-straight night of attacks
item.description: The US has made good on threats to bomb civilian infrastructure in Iran in its sixth-straight night of attacks.

item.title: Israeli settlers attack Sinjil town in occupied West Bank
item.description: Clashes erupted after Israeli settlers attacked the outskirts of the occupied West Bank town of Sinjil.

item.title: China rebukes UK over nationalisation of British Steel
item.description: The UK has appropriated its last working steelworks following fears its former Chinese owners would shut it down.

item.title: Which players are favourites to be FIFA World Cup 2026 award winners?
item.description: Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappe are among the biggest stars expected to walk away with at least one individual award.

item.title: Iranian sources say US strikes hit civilian infrastructure
item.description: Iranian social media accounts, and local sources allege that US strikes caused casualties and hit infrastructure.

item.title: IEA chief warns Strait of Hormuz crisis threatens global energy security
item.description: Fatih Birol says 'oil security is still a critical issue' and world should be 'worried' if situation does not improve.

item.title: Goa’s forgotten orchata drink lives on in family kitchens
item.description: Once reserved for elite Catholic households, this almond drink survives thanks to Goans preserving tradition.

item.title: How three Ivorian firms are competing with global brands
item.description: Homegrown firms are gaining ground in Ivory Coast's fuel, finance and cosmetics sectors.

item.title: ‘Trump Accounts’ are symbolic, not effective at closing wealth gap
item.description: The wealth gap is wider than it’s been in three decades.

item.title: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un meets with top Chinese official
item.description: The meeting comes after Xi visited Kim, promising closer diplomatic, law enforcement and military cooperation.

item.title: Falling debris from intercepted Iranian strikes sparks fires in Kuwait
item.description: Moment a projectile struck a border area between Kuwait and Iraq, sparking a fire and sending thick smoke into the sky.

item.title: Brazilian football legend Pele’s World Cup shirt sells for $4.9m
item.description: The sale is a record for the Brazilian footballing great, but far from the most expensive piece of sporting memorabilia.

item.title: Iran war live: US carries out strikes on civilian infrastructure in south
item.description: Officials report power outages, attack on train station in Bandar, as Iran says Hormuz won't return to pre-war status.

item.title: Venezuela earthquake: Number of known dead rises to nearly 5,000 victims
item.description: The UN estimates 50,000 are missing, with many more feared dead under the rubble as the focus shifts to rebuilding.

item.title: Vietnamese activist Bao Ngoc places rare national spotlight on Gaza
item.description: Activist Bao Ngoc draws attention to plight of Palestinians in country where protest is tightly controlled.

item.title: Qatar rejects Israeli reports of military action against Iran
item.description: Qatar has rejected Israeli media reports claiming the Qataris agreed to participate in military action against Iran.

item.title: Sadiq Khan joins House of Lords as outgoing UK PM names 26 new peers
item.description: PM Keir Starmer's final honours list also includes campaigners, military leaders and senior civil servants.

item.title: Former Italian motorway chief sentenced over bridge collapse
item.description: The former CEO of Italy’s main highway operator has been given 12 years in prison.

item.title: Ilhan Omar renews push for US to join ICC amid Trump pressure
item.description: The resolution comes days after US Secretary of State Marco Rubio pledged to 'dismantle' the international court.

item.title: Grand Mosque of Paris celebrates 100-year anniversary
item.description: The Grand Mosque of Paris is celebrating 100 years since its inauguration.

item.title: FIFA to probe Argentina’s Falklands banner display at World Cup semifinal
item.description: FIFA says its disciplinary committee will assess match reports and consider relevant circumstances before taking any action.

item.title: Iran says seven killed in latest US strikes, warns war ‘will spread’
item.description: Reported attacks on bridges, rail and communications infrastructure come as both sides harden their positions.
